# Pricing-Year Diff

Comparing `2025` to `2026`.

## Changed

- `constants.nep`: `7434` -> `7418`
- `constants.nec_fixed`: `3000000` -> `3127000`
- `classification_versions.ar_drg`: `11.0` -> `12.0`
- `classification_versions.tier_2`: `9.1` -> `10.0`
- `source_artifacts.calculator_archive`: `NEP25_SAS_NWAU_Calculator.7Z` -> `NEP26_SAS_NWAU_Calculator.7Z`

## Unchanged

- `constants.shared_flag`: `stable`
- `validation_status`: `validated`

## Missing

- `source_artifacts.price_weights`: present in `2025`, absent in `2026`

## New

- `constants.new_parameter`: `introduced`
